{{Infobox concept
| name = Executor program
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]] discovered restricted records of the [[Court of Seven]] regarding the [[Executor program]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Executor program]] is a critical business requiring three [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Executor program]] is noted for always failing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
